svg.title: Godot LSP connection and document lifecycle
svg.desc: An inferred lifecycle projects the explicit TCP connect, initialize and initialized handshake, didOpen and didChange synchronization, connection-drop recovery, reconnect, shutdown, and exit operations. Every inferred transition uses a normal arrow and carries its evidence status in the label.
